name: Mocha Chip Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and brown sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
3. Sift dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, coffee) into the egg mixture.
4. Stir in chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
5. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch X 15-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
